title: Pork Stir Fry with Kenyan Flair
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry dish with Kenyan inspiration, featuring tender pork and crunchy vegetables.

ingredients.name: Kenyan Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most African markets or online

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced pork and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Add the onion, bell pepper, and tomato. Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the Kenyan spice blend and stir to combine.
Return the cooked pork to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables and spice blend.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro.
